THE CONSTRAINTS INCLUDE THE GIVEN VELOCITY FUNCTION AND THE CONDITION THAT THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY IS 12 m/s AT t = 3 SECONDS.

<<MODULE 3: DECOMPOSITION INTO PARTS>>
